Package lib.unpacked.org.mitre.cpe.common

package lib.unpacked.org.mitre.cpe.common

The contents of this package were copied from the CPE 2.3 reference implementation:

Reference Implementation — Version 2.3
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    LogicalValue
    This class represents a Logical Value.
    Utilities
    A collection of utility functions for use with the org.mitre.cpe.matching and org.mitre.cpe.naming packages.
    WellFormedName
    The WellFormedName class represents a Well Formed Name, as defined in the CPE Specification version 2.3.
